free_text: A study of proton scattering on C-12 and C-13 at 7-MeV.
-By compiler. All measured cross sections are presented
as function of scattering angle (in centre of mass
system) but it is unknown what frame was used for
measured cross section (laboratory or C.-M. System).
The natural carbon targets were produced from a
gpaphite emulsion and by cracking methyl iodide on a
heated platinum disk. The enriched targets were
produced from methyl iodide only. The thickness of each
C-12 and C-13 contents in the enriched targets were
determined by comparing the C-12(d,P(O)) and
C-13(d,P(O)) stripping peaks at angle equal 58-degree
from an exactly defined polystyrene target and an
enriched target. The C-13 enrichment obtained was
The results of the cross section measurements have been
corrected with respect to the observed contaminations.
